title: Vanilla Reshaped
description: Improves vanilla in the parts where it is lacking.
body:
The Main focus of this modpack is to overhaul vanilla in every way that it lacks.
It does this by changing the generation of biomes, structures and ores. Some mobs that were lacking also got overhauls and other mobs even got added to add more life into the world in general.

This modpack includes: Overhauled Cooking, Overhauled creepers and Enderman, Overhauled Nether + End, New Bosses, New terrain generation, New mobs, New Plants, New Enchantment system and slight alterations to the progression system.
